title: About 40 passengers Left Ship Hit By Hantavirus Outbreak At Island Of St. Helena
summary_full: Recent update on the hantavirus outbreak details that about 40 passengers from a cruise ship by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have disembarked on St. Helena.
summary_public: Recent update on the hantavirus outbreak details that about 40 passengers from a cruise ship by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have disembarked on St. Helena.
